svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 818px; height: 1px; padding-top: 33px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: user suite stack（16GB host OK / kind + minimum stack + 任意 stack opt-in）

div.div:
Minimum Stack（必須）
Dapr + tier1 facade + Keycloak + 1 backend（CNPG / MinIO / Valkey から選択）

任意 Stack（test ごと opt-in、同時 2 件まで）
Workflow / Decision / Strimzi / Argo CD / Grafana LGTM 縮小版
